$comment: Dashboard layout. Copied to layout.local.json (gitignored) on first build; edit that to rearrange panels. Grid is `columns` wide and (optionally) `rows` tall — when `rows` is set, rows are equal-height and fill the screen; omit it to let rows grow to content. Each panel sets col/row start (1-based) and w/h span. Omit col/row to auto-flow. Panels with no entry use their module's manifest defaultSize.
